resultList.dtldesc: Gemini said::Experience the perfect blend of modern luxury and strategic connectivity in this impressive 3 BHK residence located in the prestigious Akshaya The Belvedere, Urapakkam. This well-maintained apartment offers a sophisticated living environment in one of Chennai's most sought-after residential hubs, making it an ideal choice for families seeking a balance of comfort and accessibility.::::Property Specifications::::This expansive apartment spans a generous super built-up area of 1,564 sq. ft and is positioned on the 10th floor of a 14-storey tower, ensuring excellent natural ventilation and panoramic views of the surrounding landscape. The semi-furnished residence features three spacious bedrooms and three modern bathrooms, along with three private balconies that enhance the airy feel of the home. The interiors are thoughtfully designed with professional finishes and high-quality flooring, reflecting the premium standards of the Akshaya The Belvedere project. As a ready-to-move-in unit with an age of construction between 5 to 10 years, it provides a seamless transition for those looking to settle into a mature and well-managed gated community.::::Facilities::::Akshaya The Belvedere is equipped with a comprehensive suite of world-class facilities to support a contemporary lifestyle. Residents benefit from a 3-tier security system, 24-hour water supply, and a reliable power backup system. The project features a wide array of amenities, including a fully-equipped gymnasium, an aerobics room, a dedicated kids' play area, and a cycling and jogging track. For recreation, the complex offers beautifully landscaped flower gardens and large open spaces that foster a professional yet serene atmosphere. Additional conveniences include reserved parking, high-speed lift access, and professional maintenance services, ensuring that every aspect of daily life is well-catered for within the secure confines of the society.::::Locality::::Urapakkam is a premier residential locality in South Chennai, renowned for its superb connectivity via both rail and road. The property is exceptionally well-positioned near the National Highway 45 (GST Road) and the Urapakkam Railway Station, providing an effortless commute to the Chennai International Airport and major business districts. The neighbourhood is home to reputed educational institutions like Vidya Mandir and quality healthcare facilities such as Green Life Hospital and Family Dental Care. For daily shopping and leisure, residents have quick access to local markets and supermarkets. With its proximity to the upcoming Kilambakkam Bus Terminus and the thriving industrial belts of Guduvanchery and Tambaram, Urapakkam remains a highly desirable destination for long-term residency.
